{"id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0","title":"PHY: TDMA overlay for gateway-centric mode","description":"## Problem

Even with protocol optimizations, uncoordinated channel access causes collisions. TDMA eliminates collisions by assigning time slots to nodes.

## Hardware requirement

**Works on ALL hardware.** Pure software solution. Requires time synchronization (GPS or gateway beacon).

## Solution

Add TDMA as optional overlay for gateway-centric deployments:
1. Gateway broadcasts time beacon (sync frame)
2. Gateway assigns slots to nodes (in DIO or dedicated message)
3. Nodes transmit only in assigned slot
4. Slot reuse: distant nodes can share slots (spatial TDMA)

## Modes

- **Beacon-sync**: Gateway sends periodic beacon, nodes sync to it
- **GPS-sync**: All nodes have GPS, no beacon needed (saves airtime)

## Tradeoffs

- Requires gateway (not for pure P2P mesh)
- Slot waste when nodes are idle
- Coordination overhead (beacon, slot assignment)
- But: zero collisions within coordinated group

## Acceptance criteria

- Spec defines TDMA frame structure and slot assignment
- Implementations support beacon sync
- Gateway can assign/reassign slots dynamically
- Scale test shows zero intra-mesh collisions","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:26.943305Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:26.943305Z","labels":["phy","scalability","protocol"]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"Spec issue closed; both simulator gates pass with canonical vectors/results; only then Python, Rust, and Zephyr implementation may begin.","description":"Optional CCP v1 scheduled mode for dense LICHEN deployments. Every scheduled participant requires GNSS with hardware PPS; nodes without valid PPS remain fully functional on baseline CH0 CAD/CSMA and may use unscheduled channel rendezvous. The accepted DODAG root issues root-signed, recipient-paged leased cells binding slot, channel, transmitter, and receiver. Version 1 permits concurrent distinct-channel cells with disjoint endpoints, forbids same-channel spatial reuse, requires CAD in every cell, and falls back to CH0 on invalid time, holdover expiry, or lease loss. Production implementation is gated by deterministic simulator evidence in i9r0.2 and da2q.3.","design":"Normative protocol is spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. GPS system time plus hardware PPS defines ASN; dynamic root assignments and exact signed control formats replace gateway beacons and static hash slots.","spec_id":"spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md","title":"PHY: GNSS-PPS coordinated capacity scheduling"}
